claim_ruling: Flagship claim ends; DLGI demoted to a shorter theorem/method note (R34 sec.3 -- no repair round authorized).

C1.name: calibrated t_c coverage
C1.note: KILL clause is verbatim (coverage<0.92 or nonfinite>5%); over-coverage>0.98 is a band violation flagged WARN, not a kill -- the frozen upper-envelope critical surface errs conservative.

C3.name: point precision
C3.note: KILL if any RMSE ratio > 1.5x OR the estimator is not bit-identical to the probe (calibration must change only the uncertainty statement).
